# Agentic HTML Export QA MCP

Paid remote MCP for agentic HTML export QA MCP, structured receipts, audit logs, and reviewer-ready evidence.

Website: https://agentichtmlexportqa.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://agentichtmlexportqa.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://agentichtmlexportqa.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/agentic-html-export-qa-mcp

Use case: agentic HTML export QA MCP with structured receipts.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: check_html_export_qa, classify_layout_gap, check_link_summary, issue_export_receipt, export_html_qa_log
